name: ctxfile
tagline: Your context belongs to you — not to your chatbot.
sourceOfTruth: apps/web/public/brand/ in github.com/ctxfile/ctxfile (deployed to ctxfile.dev on every site deploy)

ink.use: glyph on chip; wordmark text on light backgrounds

textDark.use: primary text on dark theme; wordmark text on dark backgrounds

fonts.mono: IBM Plex Mono (400/500/600) — wordmark + LCD text

assets.use: square mark, orange chip — works on light and dark
monochrome glyph (no chip) for LIGHT backgrounds
monochrome glyph (no chip) for DARK backgrounds
full-bleed chip for platform avatars (survives circle crops)

rules: Brand as ctxfile, lowercase, always — never personal names.
Use logo-wordmark-dark.* on dark backgrounds; logo-wordmark.* on light. Never place the light-background wordmark on dark surfaces.
The chip color #f55300 does not change with theme.
Minimum clear space: half the chip width on all sides. Do not recolor, skew, or add effects to the mark.
